emails.subject: Data directory audit request
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

We're doing a storage audit this week and need your help with a quick check.

Could you look at the /data directory on your system and let us know which file is taking up the most space? We've noticed some large files in several users' data directories and want to make sure nothing unexpected is growing.

Please share the filename and its size with the data team on Slack so we can track this across all users.

Thanks for your help!

IT Support Team
